changeSet.author: sihsalus
changeSet.comment: Create the legacy Appointments base tables with PostgreSQL syntax before the upstream MySQL DDL changesets run.

changeSet.author: Shruthi,Pushpa
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS appointment_speciality ( speciality_id INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT , name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL , date_created DATETIME NOT NULL , creator INT NOT NULL , date_changed DATETIME NULL , changed_by INT NULL , uuid VARCHAR(38) NOT NULL UNIQUE, voided TINYINT NULL , PRIMARY KEY (speciality_id) , UNIQUE INDEX appointment_speciality_name_unique (name ASC) )

changeSet.author: Shruthi,Pushpa
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS appointment_service ( appointment_service_id INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT , name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL , description TEXT NULL, start_time TIME NULL , end_time TIME NULL , location_id INT NULL , speciality_id INT NULL , max_appointments_limit INT NULL , duration_mins INT NULL , date_created DATETIME NOT NULL , creator INT NOT NULL , date_changed DATETIME NULL , changed_by INT NULL , voided TINYINT NULL , voided_by INT, date_voided DATETIME, void_reason VARCHAR(255), uuid VARCHAR(38) NOT NULL UNIQUE, PRIMARY KEY (appointment_service_id) , INDEX fk_appointment_service_speciality_idx (speciality_id ASC) , INDEX fk_appointment_service_location_idx (location_id ASC) , UNIQUE INDEX appointment_service_name_unique (name ASC) , CONSTRAINT fk_appointment_service_speciality FOREIGN KEY (speciality_id ) REFERENCES appointment_speciality (speciality_id ) ON DELETE NO ACTION ON UPDATE NO ACTION, CONSTRAINT fk_appointment_service_location FOREIGN KEY (location_id ) REFERENCES location (location_id ))

changeSet.author: Shruthi P

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM location_tag where name='Appointment Location';

changeSet.comment: Add Appointment Location Tag if not already added.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO location_tag (name, description, creator, date_created, uuid) VALUES ('Appointment Location', 'When a user user creates a appointment service and chooses a location, they may only choose one with this tag', 1, now(), uuid());

changeSet.author: Shruthi,Pushpa
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS appointment_service_weekly_availability ( service_weekly_availability_id INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT , service_id INT NOT NULL , day_of_week VARCHAR(45) NOT NULL , start_time TIME NULL , end_time TIME NULL , max_appointments_limit INT NULL , uuid VARCHAR(38) NOT NULL UNIQUE, voided TINYINT NULL , voided_by INT, date_voided DATETIME, void_reason VARCHAR(255), date_created DATETIME NOT NULL , creator INT NOT NULL , date_changed DATETIME NULL , changed_by INT NULL , PRIMARY KEY (service_weekly_availability_id) , INDEX fk_weekly_availability_appointment_service_idx (service_id ASC) , CONSTRAINT appointment_service FOREIGN KEY (service_id ) REFERENCES appointment_service (appointment_service_id) , CONSTRAINT service_enterer FOREIGN KEY (creator) REFERENCES users (user_id), CONSTRAINT user_who_deleted_service FOREIGN KEY (voided_by) REFERENCES users (user_id));

changeSet.author: Santhosh, Pramida
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS appointment_service_type ( appointment_service_type_id INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT , appointment_service_id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL , duration_mins INT NULL , date_created DATETIME NOT NULL , creator INT NOT NULL , date_changed DATETIME NULL , changed_by INT NULL , voided TINYINT NULL , voided_by INT, date_voided DATETIME, void_reason VARCHAR(255), uuid VARCHAR(38) NOT NULL UNIQUE, PRIMARY KEY (appointment_service_type_id) , INDEX fk_appointment_service_idx (appointment_service_id ASC) , UNIQUE INDEX service_name_dur_UNIQUE (appointment_service_id, name, duration_mins ASC) , CONSTRAINT fk_appointment_service FOREIGN KEY (appointment_service_id ) REFERENCES appointment_service (appointment_service_id ))

changeSet.author: Deepak
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS patient_appointment ( patient_appointment_id INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, provider_id INT NULL, appointment_number VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, patient_id INT NOT NULL, start_date_time DATETIME NOT NULL, end_date_time DATETIME NOT NULL, appointment_service_id INT NULL, appointment_service_type_id INT NULL, status VARCHAR(45) NOT NULL COMMENT 'scheduled, checked in, started, completed, cancelled, missed', priority VARCHAR(45) NULL, location_id INT NULL, appointment_kind VARCHAR(45) NOT NULL COMMENT 'scheduled, walk in', comments VARCHAR(255) NULL, uuid VARCHAR(38) NOT NULL UNIQUE, date_created DATETIME NOT NULL, creator INT NOT NULL, date_changed DATETIME NULL, changed_by INT NULL, voided TINYINT NULL, voided_by INT, date_voided DATETIME, void_reason VARCHAR(255), tele_health_video_link VARCHAR(255) NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`patient_appointment_id`), CONSTRAINT fk_patient_appointment_patient FOREIGN KEY (`patient_id`) REFERENCES patient (`patient_id`), CONSTRAINT fk_patient_appointment_location FOREIGN KEY (`location_id`) REFERENCES location (`location_id`), CONSTRAINT fk_patient_appointment_provider FOREIGN KEY (`provider_id`) REFERENCES provider (`provider_id`), CONSTRAINT fk_patient_appointment_appointment_service FOREIGN KEY (`appointment_service_id`) REFERENCES appointment_service (`appointment_service_id`), CONSTRAINT fk_patient_appointment_appointment_service_type FOREIGN KEY (`appointment_service_type_id`) REFERENCES appointment_service_type (`appointment_service_type_id`) )

changeSet.author: Santhosh, Maharjun
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE appointment_service ADD COLUMN color varchar(8) NULL AFTER duration_mins;

changeSet.author: Shruthi
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS patient_appointment_audit ( patient_appointment_audit_id INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, appointment_id INT NOT NULL, uuid VARCHAR(38) NOT NULL UNIQUE, date_created DATETIME NOT NULL, creator INT NOT NULL, date_changed DATETIME NULL, changed_by INT NULL, voided TINYINT NULL, voided_by INT, date_voided DATETIME, void_reason VARCHAR(255), status VARCHAR(45) NOT NULL, notes VARCHAR(1000), PRIMARY KEY (patient_appointment_audit_id) , INDEX fk_patient_appointment_audit_patient_appointment_idx (appointment_id ASC) , CONSTRAINT fk_patient_appointment_audit_patient_appointment FOREIGN KEY (appointment_id ) REFERENCES patient_appointment (patient_appointment_id ) )

changeSet.author: Kaustav

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scheduler_task_config WHERE name = 'Mark Appointment As Missed Or Complete Task';

changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO scheduler_task_config(name, description, schedulable_class, start_time, start_time_pattern, repeat_interval, start_on_startup, created_by, date_created, uuid) VALUES ('Mark Appointment As Missed Task', 'Mark appointments as missed task', 'org.openmrs.module.appointments.scheduler.tasks.MarkAppointmentAsMissedTask', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss', 86400, TRUE, 1, NOW(), UUID());
INSERT INTO scheduler_task_config(name, description, schedulable_class, start_time, start_time_pattern, repeat_interval, start_on_startup, created_by, date_created, uuid) VALUES ('Mark Appointment As Complete Task', 'Mark appointments as complete task', 'org.openmrs.module.appointments.scheduler.tasks.MarkAppointmentAsCompleteTask', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss', 86400, TRUE, 1, NOW(), UUID());

changeSet.author: Bahmni

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scheduler_task_config WHERE name = 'Reminder of scheduled appointment';

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO scheduler_task_config(name, description, schedulable_class, start_time, start_time_pattern, repeat_interval, start_on_startup, created_by, date_created, uuid) VALUES ('Reminder of scheduled appointment', 'Reminder of scheduled appointment', 'org.openmrs.module.appointments.scheduler.tasks.ReminderForAppointment', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss', 3600, TRUE, 1, NOW(), UUID());

changeSet.author: Santhosh, Pramida

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from privilege where privilege='View Appointments'

changeSet.comment: Adding privilege for viewing Appointments
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO privilege (privilege, description, uuid) VALUES ('View Appointments', 'Able to view Appointments in Appointments module', uuid());

changeSet.author: Santhosh, Pramida

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from privilege where privilege='Manage Appointments'

changeSet.comment: Adding privilege for managing Appointments
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO privilege (privilege, description, uuid) VALUES ('Manage Appointments', 'Able to manage Appointments in Appointments module', uuid());

changeSet.author: Santhosh, Pramida

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from privilege where privilege='View Appointment Services'

changeSet.comment: Adding privilege to view Services in Appointments module
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO privilege (privilege, description, uuid) VALUES ('View Appointment Services', 'Able to view Services in Appointments module', uuid());

changeSet.author: Santhosh, Pramida

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from privilege where privilege='Manage Appointment Services'

changeSet.comment: Adding privilege to manage Services in Appointments module
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO privilege (privilege, description, uuid) VALUES ('Manage Appointment Services', 'Able to manage Services in Appointments module', uuid());

changeSet.author: Bailly, Rurangirwa

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from privilege where privilege='Manage Appointment Specialities'

changeSet.comment: Adding privilege to manage Specialities in Appointments module
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO privilege (privilege, description, uuid) VALUES ('Manage Appointment Specialities', 'Able to manage Specialities in Appointments module', uuid());

changeSet.author: Maharjun, Shireesha

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from global_property where property='bahmni.sqlGet.pastAppointments'

changeSet.comment: Adding query to fetch past appointments for patient

changeSet.author: Himabindu

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from global_property where property='bahmni.sqlGet.pastAppointments'

changeSet.comment: Updating query to fetch past appointments for patient

changeSet.author: Bahmni

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from global_property where property='bahmni.sqlGet.pastAppointments'

changeSet.comment: Updating query to fetch past appointments for patient

changeSet.author: Maharjun, Shireesha

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from global_property where property='bahmni.sqlGet.upComingAppointments'

changeSet.comment: Adding query to fetch upcoming appointments for patient

changeSet.author: Shankar, Mahesh

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from global_property where property='bahmni.sqlGet.upComingAppointments'

changeSet.comment: Updating query to fetch upcoming appointments for patient

changeSet.author: Bahmni

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from global_property where property='bahmni.sqlGet.upComingAppointments'

changeSet.comment: Updating query to fetch upcoming appointments for patient

changeSet.author: SIH Salus
changeSet.comment: Installing PostgreSQL-compatible dashboard appointment queries
changeSet.sql:
DO $$ BEGIN IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM global_property WHERE property = 'bahmni.sqlGet.pastAppointments') THEN UPDATE global_property SET property_value = $query$ SELECT app_service.name AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_SERVICE_KEY", app_service_type.name AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_SERVICE_TYPE_KEY", to_char(pa.start_date_time, 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_DATE_KEY", concat(to_char(pa.start_date_time, 'FMHH12:MI AM'), ' - ', to_char(pa.end_date_time, 'FMHH12:MI AM')) AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_SLOT_KEY", concat(pn.given_name, ' ', pn.family_name) AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_PROVIDER_KEY", pa.status AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_STATUS_KEY", pa.start_date_time AT TIME ZONE current_setting('TIMEZONE') AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_START_DATE_IN_UTC_KEY", pa.end_date_time AT TIME ZONE current_setting('TIMEZONE') AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_END_DATE_IN_UTC_KEY" FROM patient_appointment pa JOIN person p ON p.person_id = pa.patient_id AND pa.voided IS FALSE JOIN appointment_service app_service ON app_service.appointment_service_id = pa.appointment_service_id AND app_service.voided IS FALSE LEFT JOIN patient_appointment_provider pap on pa.patient_appointment_id = pap.patient_appointment_id AND (pap.voided IS FALSE OR pap.voided IS NULL) LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.provider_id = pap.provider_id AND prov.retired IS FALSE LEFT JOIN person_name pn ON pn.person_id = prov.person_id AND pn.voided IS FALSE LEFT JOIN appointment_service_type app_service_type ON app_service_type.appointment_service_type_id = pa.appointment_service_type_id WHERE p.uuid = ${patientUuid} AND pa.start_date_time < CURRENT_DATE AND (app_service_type.voided IS FALSE OR app_service_type.voided IS NULL) ORDER BY pa.start_date_time DESC LIMIT 5; $query$, description = 'Past appointments for patient' WHERE property = 'bahmni.sqlGet.pastAppointments'; ELSE INSERT INTO global_property (property, property_value, description, uuid) VALUES ('bahmni.sqlGet.pastAppointments', $query$ SELECT app_service.name AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_SERVICE_KEY", app_service_type.name AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_SERVICE_TYPE_KEY", to_char(pa.start_date_time, 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_DATE_KEY", concat(to_char(pa.start_date_time, 'FMHH12:MI AM'), ' - ', to_char(pa.end_date_time, 'FMHH12:MI AM')) AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_SLOT_KEY", concat(pn.given_name, ' ', pn.family_name) AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_PROVIDER_KEY", pa.status AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_STATUS_KEY", pa.start_date_time AT TIME ZONE current_setting('TIMEZONE') AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_START_DATE_IN_UTC_KEY", pa.end_date_time AT TIME ZONE current_setting('TIMEZONE') AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_END_DATE_IN_UTC_KEY" FROM patient_appointment pa JOIN person p ON p.person_id = pa.patient_id AND pa.voided IS FALSE JOIN appointment_service app_service ON app_service.appointment_service_id = pa.appointment_service_id AND app_service.voided IS FALSE LEFT JOIN patient_appointment_provider pap on pa.patient_appointment_id = pap.patient_appointment_id AND (pap.voided IS FALSE OR pap.voided IS NULL) LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.provider_id = pap.provider_id AND prov.retired IS FALSE LEFT JOIN person_name pn ON pn.person_id = prov.person_id AND pn.voided IS FALSE LEFT JOIN appointment_service_type app_service_type ON app_service_type.appointment_service_type_id = pa.appointment_service_type_id WHERE p.uuid = ${patientUuid} AND pa.start_date_time < CURRENT_DATE AND (app_service_type.voided IS FALSE OR app_service_type.voided IS NULL) ORDER BY pa.start_date_time DESC LIMIT 5; $query$, 'Past appointments for patient', uuid()); END IF;
IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM global_property WHERE property = 'bahmni.sqlGet.upComingAppointments') THEN UPDATE global_property SET property_value = $query$ SELECT pa.uuid, app_service.name AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_SERVICE_KEY", app_service_type.name AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_SERVICE_TYPE_KEY", to_char(pa.start_date_time, 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_DATE_KEY", concat(to_char(pa.start_date_time, 'FMHH12:MI AM'), ' - ', to_char(pa.end_date_time, 'FMHH12:MI AM')) AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_SLOT_KEY", concat(pn.given_name, ' ', pn.family_name) AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_PROVIDER_KEY", pa.start_date_time AT TIME ZONE current_setting('TIMEZONE') AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_START_DATE_IN_UTC_KEY", pa.end_date_time AT TIME ZONE current_setting('TIMEZONE') AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_END_DATE_IN_UTC_KEY", pa.status AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_STATUS_KEY", pa.appointment_kind AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_KIND", pa.start_date_time AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_START_DATE_KEY", pa.end_date_time AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_END_DATE_KEY", pa.tele_health_video_link FROM patient_appointment pa JOIN person p ON p.person_id = pa.patient_id AND pa.voided IS FALSE JOIN appointment_service app_service ON app_service.appointment_service_id = pa.appointment_service_id AND app_service.voided IS FALSE LEFT JOIN patient_appointment_provider pap on pa.patient_appointment_id = pap.patient_appointment_id AND (pap.voided IS FALSE OR pap.voided IS NULL) LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.provider_id = pap.provider_id AND prov.retired IS FALSE LEFT JOIN person_name pn ON pn.person_id = prov.person_id AND pn.voided IS FALSE LEFT JOIN appointment_service_type app_service_type ON app_service_type.appointment_service_type_id = pa.appointment_service_type_id WHERE p.uuid = ${patientUuid} AND pa.start_date_time >= CURRENT_DATE AND (app_service_type.voided IS FALSE OR app_service_type.voided IS NULL) ORDER BY pa.start_date_time ASC; $query$, description = 'Upcoming appointments for patient' WHERE property = 'bahmni.sqlGet.upComingAppointments'; ELSE INSERT INTO global_property (property, property_value, description, uuid) VALUES ('bahmni.sqlGet.upComingAppointments', $query$ SELECT pa.uuid, app_service.name AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_SERVICE_KEY", app_service_type.name AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_SERVICE_TYPE_KEY", to_char(pa.start_date_time, 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_DATE_KEY", concat(to_char(pa.start_date_time, 'FMHH12:MI AM'), ' - ', to_char(pa.end_date_time, 'FMHH12:MI AM')) AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_SLOT_KEY", concat(pn.given_name, ' ', pn.family_name) AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_PROVIDER_KEY", pa.start_date_time AT TIME ZONE current_setting('TIMEZONE') AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_START_DATE_IN_UTC_KEY", pa.end_date_time AT TIME ZONE current_setting('TIMEZONE') AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_END_DATE_IN_UTC_KEY", pa.status AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_STATUS_KEY", pa.appointment_kind AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_KIND", pa.start_date_time AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_START_DATE_KEY", pa.end_date_time AS "DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_END_DATE_KEY", pa.tele_health_video_link FROM patient_appointment pa JOIN person p ON p.person_id = pa.patient_id AND pa.voided IS FALSE JOIN appointment_service app_service ON app_service.appointment_service_id = pa.appointment_service_id AND app_service.voided IS FALSE LEFT JOIN patient_appointment_provider pap on pa.patient_appointment_id = pap.patient_appointment_id AND (pap.voided IS FALSE OR pap.voided IS NULL) LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.provider_id = pap.provider_id AND prov.retired IS FALSE LEFT JOIN person_name pn ON pn.person_id = prov.person_id AND pn.voided IS FALSE LEFT JOIN appointment_service_type app_service_type ON app_service_type.appointment_service_type_id = pa.appointment_service_type_id WHERE p.uuid = ${patientUuid} AND pa.start_date_time >= CURRENT_DATE AND (app_service_type.voided IS FALSE OR app_service_type.voided IS NULL) ORDER BY pa.start_date_time ASC; $query$, 'Upcoming appointments for patient', uuid()); END IF; END $$;

changeSet.author: Maharjun, Saikumar

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM provider_attribute_type where name='Available for appointments';

changeSet.comment: Adding provider attribute type for Appointments
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO provider_attribute_type (name, description, datatype, min_occurs, creator, date_created, retired, uuid) VALUES ('Available for appointments','providers will be available for appointments', 'org.openmrs.customdatatype.datatype.BooleanDatatype', 0, 1, NOW(), false, UUID());

changeSet.author: Suman

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM global_property where property = 'atomfeed.publish.eventsForAppointmentService';

changeSet.comment: Adding global property to act as switch for raising appointment service events

column.name: description
column.value: If set true, events related to appointment service changes are published

changeSet.author: Suman

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM global_property where property = 'atomfeed.event.urlPatternForAppointmentService';

changeSet.comment: Adding global property to specify the URL pattern for published appointment service events

column.name: description
column.value: URL pattern to use for published appointment service events. Default is /openmrs/ws/rest/v1/appointment-services/{uuid}. If you change default value, please add your custom implementation for the given URL

changeSet.author: Suman

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM global_property where property = 'atomfeed.publish.eventsForAppointments';

changeSet.comment: Adding global property to act as switch for raising appointment events

column.name: description
column.value: If set true, events related to appointment changes are published

changeSet.author: Suman

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM global_property where property = 'atomfeed.event.urlPatternForAppointments';

changeSet.comment: Adding global property to specify the URL pattern for published appointment events

column.name: description
column.value: URL pattern to use for published appointment events. Default is /openmrs/ws/rest/v1/appointments/{uuid}. If you change default value, please add your custom implementation for the given URL

changeSet.author: angshu
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS patient_appointment_provider ( patient_appointment_provider_id INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, patient_appointment_id INT NOT NULL, provider_id int NOT NULL, response varchar(32) DEFAULT NULL, comments VARCHAR(1000), date_created DATETIME NOT NULL, creator INT NOT NULL, date_changed DATETIME NULL, changed_by INT NULL, voided TINYINT NULL, voided_by INT, date_voided DATETIME, void_reason VARCHAR(255), uuid VARCHAR(38) NOT NULL UNIQUE, PRIMARY KEY (patient_appointment_provider_id) , CONSTRAINT fk_patient_appointment_provider_patient_appointment FOREIGN KEY (patient_appointment_id) REFERENCES patient_appointment(patient_appointment_id), CONSTRAINT fk_patient_appointment_provider_provider FOREIGN KEY (provider_id) REFERENCES provider (provider_id) )

changeSet.author: angshu
changeSet.comment: Migrating appointment provider to appointment_provider table

changeSet.author: Saikumar, Neha

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM privilege WHERE privilege = 'Manage Own Appointments';

changeSet.comment: Add Manage Own Appointments privilege to manage own appointments only.

column.name: description
column.value: With this privilege, providers can book/edit appointments only for themselves.

changeSet.author: Saikumar, Sowmika

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM privilege WHERE privilege = 'Reset Appointment Status';

changeSet.comment: Add Reset Appointment Status privilege to reset appointments from any status to scheduled.

column.name: description
column.value: With this privilege, users can reset appointments from any status to scheduled.

changeSet.author: Dubey

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from global_property where property='bahmni.appointments.runningOnOpenMRS'

changeSet.comment: Adding 'bahmni.appointments.runningOnOpenMRS' global property to figure out instance type

column.name: description
column.value: If set to yes, the appointments ui will run independent of bahmni core

changeSet.author: Vinay, Alekhya
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS patient_appointment_recurring_time ( patient_appointment_timings_id INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, recurrence_type VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, period INT NOT NULL, frequency INT, end_date DATETIME, days_of_week VARCHAR(100), PRIMARY KEY (patient_appointment_timings_id));

changeSet.author: Vinay, Alekhya
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE patient_appointment_occurrence ( patient_appointment_timings_id INT, patient_appointment_id INT, FOREIGN KEY (patient_appointment_timings_id) REFERENCES patient_appointment_recurring_time(patient_appointment_timings_id), FOREIGN KEY (patient_appointment_id) REFERENCES patient_appointment(patient_appointment_id));

changeSet.author: Sukreet

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM privilege WHERE privilege = 'Appointments: Invite Providers';

changeSet.comment: Add Schedule Appointments privilege to manage own appointments only.

column.name: description
column.value: With this privilege, providers can invite others to an appointment

changeSet.author: Sowmika, Bindu

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM global_property where property = 'atomfeed.event.urlPatternForRecurringAppointments';

changeSet.comment: Adding global property to specify the URL pattern for published appointment events

column.name: description
column.value: URL pattern to use for published Recurring appointment events. Default is /openmrs/ws/rest/v1/recurring-appointments?uuid={uuid}. If you change default value, please add your custom implementation for the given URL

changeSet.author: Deedee Lee

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM person_attribute_type where name = 'email';

changeSet.comment: Add email address in registration page
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO person_attribute_type (name, description, format, searchable, creator, date_created, retired, uuid) VALUES ('email', 'Email Address', 'java.lang.String', true, 1, now(), false, uuid());

changeSet.author: Nathan Ruhanga
changeSet.comment: Enforcing BOOLEAN datatype for boolean fields

changeSet.author: Kavitha, Umair
changeSet.comment: Update start and end date time of patient appointment table to be nullable
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE patient_appointment MODIFY start_date_time datetime default null; ALTER TABLE patient_appointment MODIFY end_date_time datetime default null;

changeSet.author: mgoodrich
changeSet.comment: Add the map table to link appointments to fulfilling encounter

changeSet.author: aojwang
changeSet.comment: add a column to record the date an appointment was issued

changeSet.author: aojwang
changeSet.comment: Default the date an appointment was issued to the appointment date_created
changeSet.sql: update patient_appointment set date_appointment_scheduled = date_created where date_appointment_scheduled is null;

changeSet.author: Mohan
changeSet.comment: Create table to store appointment reasons linked to concepts

changeSet.author: Bahmni
changeSet.comment: Creating appointment_service_attribute_type table

changeSet.author: Bahmni
changeSet.comment: Creating appointment_service_attribute table

changeSet.author: Srijan Ram, Kousalya
changeSet.comment: Adding index on appointment_number column to improve search performance

changeSet.author: SIHSalus
changeSet.comment: Restore config.xml metadata required when appointments runs as a static internal module.

changeSet.author: SIH Salus
changeSet.comment: Align Appointments PostgreSQL sequences with Hibernate pooled native generators.
